market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: 24% Below Avg – Modern 2‑Bed Flat in Leeds
Modern Leeds Flat for 4 – Low Price, High Comfort
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your modern 2‑bedroom flat in the heart of Leeds, perfect for up to four guests seeking comfort and convenience at an unbeatable price. This entire home boasts a sleek, contemporary design with an open‑plan living area, fully equipped kitchen, and two bright bedrooms each fitted with comfortable mattresses and ample storage. Large windows flood the space with natural light, highlighting the stylish furnishings and thoughtful touches that make every stay feel like home.

Located just minutes from Leeds city centre, you’ll enjoy easy access to top restaurants, shopping districts, cultural attractions, and excellent transport links. After a day of exploring, unwind on the cozy sofa and catch your favourite shows on the flat‑screen TV, or enjoy a quiet evening on the balcony with city views.

Rated 4.93 from 127 reviews, guests consistently praise the flat’s cleanliness, location, and value. At a nightly rate of £117.60, you’re enjoying a 24% discount compared with the city median, while the property already maintains a strong 56.5% occupancy for the next 90 days. Host Philip, though new to hosting, is committed to providing a seamless experience. Book now and experience modern Leeds living at a price that makes sense.
top_amenity_gaps: Entertainment amenities (e.g., streaming TV, board games)
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, high‑resolution image of the living area as the cover photo; it instantly showcases the modern décor and space, encouraging clicks.
key_diagnosis: Raise the nightly rate by up to 10% (to ~£129) – you’re already 24% below the £154.60 median, so a modest increase can boost revenue while likely keeping occupancy above 56.5%.
Add at least one high‑value amenity such as dedicated parking or a balcony – these are missing and can justify higher rates and attract more guests.
Upload a full set of professional photos (minimum 8) covering the living room, kitchen, each bedroom, bathroom, and any outdoor area – better visuals raise click‑through and booking conversion.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your nightly rate is 24% below the Leeds median while you’re already enjoying 56.5% occupancy – a modest price tweak could boost your earnings without sacrificing bookings.
